reviews.review_description:
I was scared! And that's not easy to achieve these days, so they've already won me over haha
Or rather, it was tension, the tension of being about to win the game but hearing the ghosts' footsteps or unsettling sounds behind the walls and not being able to think clearly about how many bullets I had left, only to be devoured mercilessly while screaming like a madman... The game is very well designed and the price-quality ratio is great!
